completed_tasks.subject: Backfill 5 days of fight data + analyze WR trends
completed_tasks.solution: Scraped 312 missing fights via local scraper, ran analytics on 866 total
learnings: HP delta (+98) is primary loss factor

completed_tasks.subject: Spend 195 capital on STR
completed_tasks.solution: Spent 194 capital: STR 310→452. Discovered capital cost scaling (~2 cap/pt at high STR)
learnings: Capital cost NOT 1:1 - scales with stat level
API needs _request() retry for rate limits

completed_tasks.subject: Fix GH Actions + team detection bug
completed_tasks.root_cause: get_fight() returns data at top level, not under 'fight' key. Empty dict fallback killed team detection.
completed_tasks.solution: Changed fallback to fight_data itself. Simplified GH Actions from 5 to 3 corrective crons.
learnings: Use data.get('key', data) not data.get('key', {}) for API responses

completed_tasks.subject: Buy Laser weapon
completed_tasks.solution: Bought Laser (12,120 habs), removed Pistol, equipped. Loadout: Magnum + Laser
learnings: DELETE API needs JSON body not query params

completed_tasks.subject: Validate v11 fix impact
completed_tasks.solution: 866 fights confirm 47.5% WR, 4.7% draw rate (down from 21%)

completed_tasks.subject: Test Battle Royale
completed_tasks.solution: Fixed WS: cookie auth + connected event + circular import. Connects and registers. Needs peak hours for actual BR.
learnings: WS needs JWT as both subprotocol AND cookie

completed_tasks.subject: Fix buy_fights 401
completed_tasks.solution: Added global _request() with exponential backoff to api.py
learnings: Centralized retry logic beats per-method error handling
